app.name: Business Observability Demonstrator
app.description: AI-powered Business Observability — generate and observe journeys

scopes.name: environment-api
scopes.comment: Required for DQL queries and entity access

scopes.name: storage:logs:read
scopes.comment: Read service logs

scopes.name: storage:events:read
scopes.comment: Read Dynatrace events

scopes.name: storage:bizevents:read
scopes.comment: Read business events for Demonstrator Dashboards live DQL tiles

scopes.name: storage:metrics:read
scopes.comment: Read metrics for Developer Self-Service dashboard (service request timeseries)

scopes.name: storage:spans:read
scopes.comment: Read spans/traces for Developer Self-Service dashboard (distributed tracing)

scopes.name: storage:buckets:read
scopes.comment: Read Grail storage buckets (required for DQL queries against bizevents table)

scopes.name: app-settings:objects:read
scopes.comment: Read app settings for stored API configuration

scopes.name: app-settings:objects:write
scopes.comment: Write app settings for storing API configuration

scopes.name: app-engine:edge-connects:read
scopes.comment: Read EdgeConnect configurations

scopes.name: app-engine:edge-connects:write
scopes.comment: Create and update EdgeConnect configurations

scopes.name: app-engine:edge-connects:delete
scopes.comment: Delete EdgeConnect configurations

scopes.name: oauth2:clients:manage
scopes.comment: Create OAuth clients for EdgeConnect auto-generated credentials

scopes.name: settings:objects:read
scopes.comment: Read builtin settings for auto-detecting OpenPipeline, BizEvents capture, and OneAgent features

scopes.name: settings:objects:write
scopes.comment: Create builtin settings (BizEvents capture rules, OneAgent feature flags) from Get Started

scopes.name: storage:entities:read
scopes.comment: DQL query for dt.entity.host to verify OneAgent is installed on the configured host

scopes.name: openpipeline:configurations:read
scopes.comment: Read OpenPipeline configurations for detecting existing BizObs pipeline and routing

scopes.name: openpipeline:configurations:write
scopes.comment: Write OpenPipeline configurations to deploy BizObs pipeline processors and routing rules

scopes.name: automation:workflows:read
scopes.comment: Read automation workflows for detecting the BizObs Fix-It Agent workflow

scopes.name: document:documents:read
scopes.comment: Read Dynatrace Documents (AI Observability dashboard)

scopes.name: document:documents:write
scopes.comment: Create and update Dynatrace Documents (AI Observability dashboard deployment)

scopes.name: document:documents:delete
scopes.comment: Delete Dynatrace Documents for dashboard cleanup

scopes.name: document:environment-shares:write
scopes.comment: Share deployed dashboards with the entire environment

scopes.name: document:environment-shares:read
scopes.comment: Read environment share status of documents

scopes.name: environment-api:credentials:read
scopes.comment: Read credentials from the Credential Vault (GitHub PAT for AI generation)

scopes.name: environment-api:credentials:write
scopes.comment: Store credentials in the Credential Vault (GitHub PAT for AI generation)

apiConfig.name: API Configuration
apiConfig.description: Configure the connection to the BizObs Generator service
